test_boost_restoration_fixes.issue: Test was expecting SCHED_OTHER threads but starvation_gen creates SCHED_FIFO threads by default
solution: Fixed Test 1-2 to expect SCHED_FIFO (policy=1) instead of SCHED_OTHER
Fixed timing issues: wait for starvation_gen to complete naturally instead of killing prematurely
Tests 1-4 now PASS: blockees complete their work, proving stalld boosting works

starvation_gen_sched_other.feature: Added -o/--other flag to create SCHED_OTHER blockees
implementation: Added blockee_policy field to config struct (default: SCHED_FIFO)
Set blockee priority to 0 for SCHED_OTHER (POSIX requirement)
Updated validation to only check priority for SCHED_FIFO
Improved startup output to show blockee policy

test_3_sched_other_update.issue: Test 3 'Nice Values Preserved' was testing SCHED_FIFO tasks which don't have nice values
test_3_sched_other_update.solution: Updated to use -o flag for SCHED_OTHER blockees (which actually have nice values)
test_3_sched_other_update.finding: SCHED_OTHER blockees do NOT complete (0/1), suggesting stalld may only boost RT tasks

test_boost_restoration_sched_debug.test_3_sched_other: Blockees completed: 0/1 (expected - stalld may not boost SCHED_OTHER)
test_boost_restoration_sched_debug.test_5_task_exit: ✗ FAIL - stalld crashes when task dies during boost (known issue)

stalld_sched_other_behavior.observation: SCHED_OTHER blockees in Test 3 do NOT complete even with stalld running
stalld_sched_other_behavior.hypothesis: stalld may be designed to only boost RT tasks (SCHED_FIFO/SCHED_DEADLINE), not SCHED_OTHER
next_steps: Check stalld documentation/code to confirm if SCHED_OTHER boosting is supported
If not supported: document this limitation in test comments
If should be supported: investigate why it's not working

test_5_stalld_crash.issue: stalld exits when a boosted task dies during boost period
test_5_stalld_crash.status: Known issue, not addressed in this session
test_5_stalld_crash.test_assertion: expects stalld to keep running (assert_process_running fails)

starvation_gen_enhancements: Graceful shutdown based on blockee completion count
test_runner_enhancements: Added --test option to run individual tests by name
Useful for focused testing during development

known_limitations: queue_track backend cannot detect SCHED_FIFO tasks on runqueue

SCHED_OTHER tasks may not be boosted by stalld
